title: Opening for Software Engineer at BigBasket

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at BigBasket
jsonLd.description:
Join the BigBasket family as a Software Engineer in Nashik. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BigBasket:
BigBasket is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket!
